channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Journalist hit by Israeli strike while reporting in Lebanon
item.description: A journalist for Press TV has been hit by shrapnel while filming a report on Israeli attacks in southern Lebanon.

item.title: Egypt draw 1–1 with Belgium at World Cup group game
item.description: Emam Ashour's first international goal gave Egypt the lead, before veteran Romelu Lukaku forced an own goal to equalise.

item.title: Iran vs New Zealand live: World Cup 2026
item.description: Follow our live build-up, protest news, score, team sheets, score, photos and text commentary stream from Los Angeles.

item.title: Can a social media ban protect young users?
item.description: The UK says it's banning access to social media for those under age 16.

item.title: 7-year-old mourns father and brother killed in Israeli strike on Gaza
item.description: 7-year-old mourns father and brother killed in Israeli strike on Gaza.

item.title: EU officially launches Ukraine and Moldova accession process
item.description: Kyiv sees EU accession as a security guarantee and alignment with Western values as it defends against Russian invasion.

item.title: Hungarian MPs approve PM limits to block potential return of Orban
item.description: The reform is one of the first introduced by PM Peter Magyar as he seeks to return Hungary to the EU mainstream.

item.title: Trump touts Iran deal and Ukraine ambition as he arrives at G7
item.description: Amid G7 tensions, Trump says Iran agreement is a step towards peace in the Middle East and beyond.

item.title: Netanyahu says Israel won’t leave occupied land in Lebanon
item.description: Israel's occupation of territory in Lebanon and Syria will continue, PM Netanyahu said, despite US deal with Iran.

item.title: What Israeli leaders are saying about US-Iran ‘peace deal’
item.description: Israel’s political leaders, including Itamar Ben-Gvir and Bezalel Smotrich, have reacted to the US-Iran agreement.

item.title: California Governor Newsom says US Department of Justice investigating him
item.description: Newsom says he and wife targeted because he is considering running for president in 2028; DOJ has not confirmed probe.

item.title: Russian supersonic bomber crashes in Siberia during training exercise
item.description: A Russian Tu-22M3 strategic bomber crashed in Siberia’s Irkutsk region during a training flight.

item.title: Dutch court sentences Syrian to 26 years for torturing for al-Assad
item.description: The sentence is the latest in a series of European cases against Syrians since Bashar al-Assad was overthrown in 2024.

item.title: US Air Force B-52 bomber crashes after takeoff at Edwards Air Force Base
item.description: It was not immediately clear if there were any casualties in crash at base north of Los Angeles, California.

item.title: US judge dismisses Musk’s xAI trade secret lawsuit against OpenAI
item.description: The lawsuit originally filed in September focused on broader alleged misappropriation of confidential information.

item.title: EU fails to agree on sanctions for far-right Israeli minister Ben-Gvir
item.description: EU diplomacy chief Kaja Kallas confirms EU remains divided on sanctioning Israel

item.title: France vs Senegal: World Cup 2026 – Mbappe, teams, lineups, start, Dembele
item.description: Two-time champions France begin their Group I campaign by taking on Senegal in New York New Jersey on Tuesday.

item.title: Tunisia sack boss Sabri Lamouchi after World Cup thrashing by Sweden
item.description: Tunisia coach Sabri Lamouchi pays the price for 5-1 football defeat to Sweden in Group F opener at World Cup 2026.

item.title: Zelenskyy visits historic Kyiv cathedral after deadly Russian strike
item.description: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy visited a landmark Kyiv cathedral damaged by Russian missile and drone strikes.

item.title: Spain held to shock draw by Cape Verde in their World Cup opener
item.description: Lamine Yamal comes off the bench but cannot help Spain overcome World Cup debutants Cape Verde in 0-0 draw.

item.title: As deal is agreed with US, not all in Iran are convinced that peace is here
item.description: Iranians are sceptical that a US-Iran agreement will end their hardships.

item.title: Police, mourners clash over coffin of suspected Ebola victim in DRC
item.description: Clashes have broken out between police and mourners during a funeral of a suspected Ebola victim in the DRC.

item.title: US visa rules leave Iraq’s World Cup fans behind
item.description: Iraq’s fans are celebrating their country’s first World Cup qualification in over 40 years.

item.title: Singer Oliver Tree among six killed in Brazil helicopter collision
item.description: Two helicopters collided in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil, killing six people, including American musician Oliver Tree.

item.title: Bus crash in Ethiopian mountains kills at least 31
item.description: Ethiopia is one of the worst countries in the world for road traffic accidents and has notoriously dangerous roads.
